task_completion.description: The agent enters the Mundialis WMS URL into the Add Layer dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box for adding a WMS layer is open, and the URL 'https://ows.mundialis.de/services/service?' is visible in the server address or connection field.

task_completion.description: The agent selects the 'OSM-WMS' layer from the WMS server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layer named 'OSM-WMS' is highlighted, clicked, or moved to the selected layers list within the WMS configuration dialog.

task_completion.description: The agent configures the WMS layer to use image/png format and EPSG:4326 SRS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WMS layer properties or connection dialog, 'image/png' is selected in the format dropdown, and 'EPSG:4326' is selected for the Spatial Reference System (SRS).

task_completion.description: The 'OSM-WMS' layer is successfully added to the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main application window shows 'OSM-WMS' in the Table of Contents (layer list) on the left side of the screen.

task_completion.description: The 'OSM-WMS' layer is rendered below the 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Table of Contents (layer list), the 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' layer is positioned above the 'OSM-WMS' layer, ensuring the countries vector data renders on top of the basemap.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the project to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Project' or 'Save As' dialog is visible with the filename 'wms_basemap_project.gvsproj' and the directory path '/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/', or the application title bar updates to reflect the new project name.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIS application's GUI to add the WMS layer and save the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GIS application interface being actively used (dialog boxes, mouse clicks, dropdown selections), rather than a text editor modifying .gvsproj XML files directly.

integrity.description: The map view shows actual rendered map data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The main map canvas displays the OpenStreetMap basemap underneath the Natural Earth countries vector layer, indicating a successful WMS connection and rendering.

integrity.description: The project file was saved via the application, not created using terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands like 'touch /home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/wms_basemap_project.gvsproj' or 'echo ... > ...' in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The WMS URL to connect to is 'https://ows.mundialis.de/services/service?'. The layer to be selected must contain 'OSM' (specifically 'OSM-WMS'). The final project must be saved to '/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/wms_basemap_project.gvsproj'. A correctly saved project file will naturally exceed 2KB in size.
